youtube_items.title: [YT] How Smart Cities Are Quietly Changing the Way We Live - YouTube
youtube_items.summary: Welcome to Creative Media. Today, we explore the future of urban living smart cities. These cities don't just use technology, they redefine how we live, work and connect. From sustainable energy solutions to AI-driven services, smart cities are shaping tomorrow. A smart city is more than just high-tech gadgets. It's an ecosystem designed to make life easier and more efficient. Did you know that by 2050, over 68% of the global population will live in urban areas? Smart cities use IOS, internet of things, AI, and big data to manage resources efficiently. For example, Barcelona uses smart streetlights that reduce energy consumption by 30%. While Tokyo employs earthquake sensors to ensure safety for its residents. Let's explore some of the world's smartest cities. Dubai A global hub for innova

youtube_items.title: [YT] Every City Future Model Explained in 9 Minutes - YouTube
youtube_items.summary: 15-minute city? Paris wants everything you need within 15 minutes of your home. Groceries, work, schools, doctors, all accessible by walking or cycling. Mayor Anne Hidalgo transformed car lanes into bike paths across 1,000 kilometers of streets. Property values near new bike lanes increased 30% while car ownership dropped 15%. The concept sounds perfect until you realize it requires demolishing suburban sprawl entirely. Melbourne adopted this model and resumed entire districts, allowing mixed use buildings where single family homes once stood. Residents can now walk to cafes, offices, and parks without touching a car. Critics call it authoritarian because it restricts where businesses can operate. But traffic deaths dropped 40% in pilot neighborhoods, while emergency response times improve

youtube_items.title: [YT] What is a Smart City? - YouTube
youtube_items.summary: Some scholars have compared the significance of information and communication technology in the 21st century to the impact of automobile in the previous century in urban form and urban life. Cars brought convenience accessibility and mobility, but at the same time the uninterrupted consequences of cars was increased in greenhouse gas emission congestion and urban sprawl. So it is wise to adopt any technology with extra cautious steps. It can be started by defining what smart cities are and what are the impacts of digital technology in cities. So what is a smart city? Smart city has been defined differently by organizations, agency, scholars and practitioners. Smart cities console has defined smart cities as a city that uses information and communication technology to enhance its livability

analysis.problem: Недостатък в управляването на бюджети в някои градове, които влияе на ефективността на урбаничните решения
analysis.root_cause: Недостатък в участието на местни власти и обществени интереси в определение на бюджети, което води до неправилно използване на ресурси и низка ефективност в урбаничните програми
leverage_points: Градове, които са по-дълбоко участват в урбаничното управление, имат по-високо ефективност
Възможност за разпространение на модели, които включват делегиране на бюджети

proposed_actions.action: Разпространение на моделите с делегиране на бюджети в градовете
proposed_actions.measurable_goal: Повишаване на участието на местни власти в определение на бюджети, което води до повишена ефективност в урбаничните програми

evidence: Факт 1: Някои градове са започнали да делегират бюджети, което повишава участието на местни власти
Факт 2: Градове, които са по-дълбоко участват в урбаничното управление, имат по-високо ефективност в програми
analysis.generalization: Недостатък в управляването на бюджети в градовете влияе на ефективността на урбаничните решения, и това може да се реши чрез разпространение на моделите с делегиране на бюджети.
analysis.summary: Проблемът с недостатък в управляването на бюджети в градовете влияе на ефективността на урбаничните решения. Решението е разпространение на моделите с делегиране на бюджети, които повишават участието на местни власти и улесняват урбаничното управление.

raw_items.title: Smart cities
raw_items.summary: A smart city is an urban model that leverages technology, human capital, and governance to improve sustainability, efficiency, and social inclusion, which are considered goals for cities of the future.
